steps.title: Fastest path: graph or solve the equation
steps.content:
Type the equation into Desmos as written:
$$4x+5=165$$Graph or solve it directly and read the x-value that works. The requested value is $40$.

steps.title: Undo the addition
steps.content: Start with $4x+5=165$. Subtract $5$ from both sides so the term with $x$ is alone: $$4x=160.$$

steps.title: Undo the multiplication
steps.content: Divide both sides by $4$: $$x=40.$$ Check by substituting: $4(40)+5=160+5=165$, so the solution is 40. The equation balances exactly, confirming there was no rounding or estimate involved.
